draw_note: CPU SamplingFrequency=PerTree, object sampling, non-pairwise. Bootstrap runs once per tree on the continuous LearnProgress->Rand (seeded random_seed). No=all 1.0/no draws. Bayesian=per-1000-block reseed (randSeed+blockIdx, Advance(10)) powf(-ln(GenRandReal1()+1e-100),temp). Bernoulli=Fill(1) + SetSampledControl GenRandReal1()<subsample sequential on the SAME Rand (no block reseed). MVS=single 8192-block threshold sampler (mvs.cpp). Poisson is rejected on CPU upstream -- no oracle exists for it.
staged_layout: flat f64: stage 0 (n_rows), then stage 1, ... ; n_iterations stages (raw approximant)
